meaning: n.有一磅重量的东西,捣杵
examples: My dad has a rule that we have to carry our pumpkins back home, and as the eldest child I have an advantage—I carried an 85-pounder back last year.
A tax of $1.29 per pound adds 64.5 cents to a good half-pounder, plus whatever tax they stick on the cheese and bun.
Yes, I'd like a quarter pounder, please.
Michelle Rodriguez, Giovanni Ribisi, Joel David Moore, CCH Pounder, Wes Studi and Laz Alonso.
But that's enough to seem more distinctive than the old Quarter Pounder with Cheese.
